examples: He seemed to be on the verge of total derangement.
She began to think he was in mental derangement.
The third letter, from another source, provides an explanation of the lady's curious mental derangement .
He has yet to show the Obama-derangement of his peers, even though he differs with him.
With his tall, chiseled Aryan looks, Eric Emil Oleson provides villainous derangement as Ma'am's increasingly insane partner in crime, a psuedo-doctor called Rat.
